auto_fixes_applied.description: is_arrow comment claimed alias expansion that never happens — rewritten to state the no-expansion truth and the cross-module alias residual
kind-set comment updated to (MUST | MAY_ENUMERATED | MAY_TOP)
orphaned collect_calls_from_expr doc moved onto the val and updated for the new signature
walk_fn_body_ref default is now a failing closure (was a silent no-op that would drop lambda bodies on an ordering regression)
duplicated pre-pass replaced by shared Arch_index_cmt.build_local_fn_stamps

findings.summary: Texp_letop recorded bind-operator calls before walking operands — 'let* y = raise Exit' forged a MUST to (let*)
findings.evidence: add_path_call before self.expr on bop_exp (empirically confirmed)
findings.fix: operands walk first, operators record after (same rule as Texp_apply); fixture letop_diverge

findings.summary: Post-dominance fixpoint was O(n^3) with ascending iteration — 2000-branch function took 123s
findings.fix: descending block order (backward dataflow) + reused scratch row: 2000-branch repro now 0.29s, all 8002 calls recorded

findings.summary: FR-012: beta-redex '(fun y -> f y) x' emitted spurious *TOP* + enumerated instead of a MUST head to the lambda node
findings.fix: literal heads resolve via lam_names to Head_local (MUST when saturated); occurrence edge suppressed; fixture beta_redex

findings.summary: FR-020: find/exported parse-errored on the main (CMT) schema so find '<fun:' could not locate lambda rows (pre-existing breakage, but FR-020 is ratified)
findings.fix: schema detection (flat exported/file_path vs main exposed + modules join); selftest assertions added; find '<fun:' returns 205 rows, exported leaks none

findings.summary: Sanctioned-replacement rule (b) accepted ANY dropped edge at a lambda-edge site, maskable real drops
findings.evidence: awk filter never inspected the old callee
findings.fix: rule (b) now requires a bare unqualified non-⊤ old callee; rule (a) documented as caller-granular by necessity

findings.summary: Cross-module partial application whose result arrow hides behind a type alias in the callee's interface keeps a MUST head (cmt envs cannot expand aliases)
findings.evidence: val mk : int -> unary; M2 'let h = M1.mk 1' → MUST
findings.fix: ACCEPTED residual: pre-existing on main, same-module cases are covered by syntactic arity tables; documented in the is_arrow comment. Closing it needs interface-arity export — follow-up

findings.summary: FR-014 letter: a recursive local lambda's self head-application (walked before stamp registration) stays MAY_TOP — fake ⊤ for functions using recursive local closures
findings.fix: ACCEPTED precision residual (sound over-approximation); pre-assigning names before the RHS walk is the follow-up

findings.summary: FR-006 wording contradiction (conditional-mode vs EC-6's straight-line fallback)
findings.fix: Spec erratum applied: FR-006 aligned with EC-6 (opaque straight-line fallback; all conditional constructs explicitly lowered)

findings.summary: User functions named _cgo*/_Cfunc_* would be reclassified to ⊤ (conservative direction, sound)
findings.fix: ACCEPTED: fails in the sound direction; position/pragma-based detection is a follow-up refinement

findings.summary: Kind-movement report joins functions by name only — duplicate names across modules inflate movement counts in the evidence artifact
findings.fix: ACCEPTED for the report (drop detection is unaffected — it uses set comparison); noted for a future module-qualified join

findings.summary: Head_qualified(None) unresolved arm asymmetry (MAY_TOP unconditional vs MAY_ENUMERATED demoted) — nearly-dead path, both outcomes sound
lam_names/head_idents keyed by Location.t — ghost-loc duplicates could cross-wire node names (names themselves disambiguated by #N)
findings.fix: ACCEPTED advisory (no observed occurrence; determinism verified)

findings.summary: solve neither consumes nor freezes the graph; verdicts not tied to their graph
findings.fix: ACCEPTED advisory (single disciplined consumer today); solved-flag hardening noted

findings.summary: Head_qualified(None,_) overlaps Head_local semantically (provenance carried by option rather than variant structure)
New scripts/ dir diverges from root selftest-*.sh convention; gate not wired to CI (rot risk)
findings.fix: ACCEPTED advisory: referenced from the contract doc as the required gate for kind-affecting changes; CI wiring optional follow-up

findings.summary: Walker closes over ten pieces of mutable state; density observation for future maintainers
findings.fix: ACCEPTED advisory: gather into a state record if the walker grows again (Rust convergence)

cross_runtime_findings.summary: codex spend cap reached after the step-4 round: steps 5-6 and this review ran with isolated Claude sub-agent substitutes (maintainer-approved). Codex re-verification when the cap resets is a recorded follow-up.
cross_runtime_findings.evidence: codex exec → 'You hit your spend cap'
cross_runtime_findings.fix: re-run codex adversarial pass on steps 5-6 + review-round fixes when available

notes: All HIGH and actionable MEDIUM findings RESOLVED with regression fixtures (57 P1 STRICT green, zero drops per callgraph-diff, golden 19/366/3112 deterministic, 2000-branch perf repro 123s→0.29s). ACCEPTED items are documented residuals failing in the sound direction or advisory architecture notes. Specialists: reviewer + spec-compliance + architect (isolated sub-agents); 6 prior per-step adversarial rounds (codex×4 GO, Claude×2 GO).
